title: Autoresearch: rook-dashboard (Juni 2026)
description:
Monthly autoresearch loop for **rook-dashboard**.

Next.js Kanban dashboard for task management. Improve performance, fix UX issues, and add missing features.

**Target path:** `/root/.openclaw/workspace/engineering/rook-dashboard`
**Focus areas:** load time, UX completeness, Kanban reliability

Run /autoresearch (agent-growth-suite) against this target.
Measure before/after. Keep only improvements that score better.
Commit results and document in AUTORESEARCH-LOG.md.
